evidence.text: Operations work is no longer just infrastructure monitoring or CI/CD glue. Modern teams need a practical map across AI-native applications, LLM observability, platform engineering, software delivery, cloud cost, security, and developer experience. This list focuses on tools that help teams build, run, observe, secure, and optimize production systems. ## Featured Maps - [LLM and Agent Observability Stack](#llm-and-agent-observability): tracing, prompt monitoring, evaluation, feedback, and production telemetry for LLM and agent systems. - [LLM Knowledge](#llm-knowledge): open-source platforms for turning docume
